title: Daphne Koller - Biography - Stanford AI Lab
text:
Daphne Koller - Biography

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| |  | | --- | | [My home page](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/index.html) | | Biography | | [Research](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/research.html) | | [Publications](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/papers.cgi) | | [My group](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/group.html) | | [Courses](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/courses.html) | | [Professional activities](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/activities.html) | | [FAQ](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/faq.html) | | [Personal](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/personal.html) | | |  | | --- | | Bio |  |  | | --- | | [Daphne Koller](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/index.html) | | |  | | --- | | I am the Rajeev Motwani Professor in the [Computer Science Department](http://www-cs.stanford.edu/) at [Stanford University](http://www.stanford.edu/). I joined the department in September 1995.   I also have a courtesy appointment in the Department of Pathology.  I completed my PhD in 1993 at Stanford, and was a postdoctoral researcher at the [Computer Science Division](http://www.cs.berkeley.edu/) at [UC Berkeley](http://www.berkeley.edu/).  Before that, I did my masters and undergraduate degrees at the [Hebrew University of Jerusalem, Israel](http://www.huji.ac.il/). Awards and Honors  * [Inaugurated   into the National Academy of Engineering, 2011](http://www.nae.edu/42046.aspx). * [ACM/Infosys   Award, 2008](http://awards.acm.org/citation.cfm?id=5086016&srt=year&year=2007&aw=165&ao=INFSYSAW). * [MacArthur   Foundation Fellowship](http://www.macfound.org/programs/fel/fel_overview.htm), 2004. * Appointed [Oswald G. Villard Fellow for Undergraduate Teaching](http://news.stanford.edu/news/2004/november17/bass-1117.html), Stanford University,   2004. * Elected Fellow of   the [American Association for Artificial   Intelligence (AAAI), 2004.](HTTP://AAAI.ORG) * [IJCAI 2001](http://awards.ijcai-01.org/) Computers and   Thought Award. If you want to see a version of my talk (without the   animations) click [here](http://robotics.stanford.edu/~koller/CnT-web.htm).   (I'm sorry to say that some of the slides only show up well on   advanced versions of Internet Explorer.) * [Presidential   Early Career Award for Scientists and Engineers (PECASE)](http://clinton6.nara.gov/2000/04/2000-04-11-president-clinton-honors-outstanding-young-scientists.html), 1999.   (I got to visit the [White House](http://www.whitehouse.gov/) when I got this award :-) * [Office of Naval Research](http://www.onr.navy.mil/) [Young   Investigator Award, 1999](http://www.onr.navy.mil/onr/newsrel/nr990223.htm). * [Sloan Foundation](http://www.sloan.org/main.htm) Research   Fellowship, 1996 * Arthur L. Samuel   Award for best thesis in the Computer Science Department, Stanford   University, 1994 * University of   California President's Postdoctoral Fellowship, 1993--1995 * Rothschild   Graduate Fellowship, 1989-1990 | | | [Click to go to robotics](http://robotics.stanford.edu/home.html)[Click to go to theory](http://theory.stanford.edu/)[Click to go to CS Stanford](http://www-cs.stanford.edu/)[Click to go to Stanford's Webpage](http://www.stanford.edu/) | | [home](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/index.html) | biography | [research](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/research.html) | [papers](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/papers.cgi) | [my group](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/group.html)   [courses](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/courses.html) | [professional activities](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/activities.html) | [FAQ](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/faq.html) | [personal](http://ai.stanford.edu/~koller/personal.html) | |  |
